title: Greenphx9's Ruby Mod
description: Adds Rubies, as well as Ruby Tools and Armor
body:
Requires Fabric API! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api

Hi, This mod is pretty simple. This mod adds everything about rubies. Rubies, Ruby Blocks, Ruby armor and Ruby Tools!

Features:

Rubies
Ruby Blocks

Ruby Ore (Drops 1 Ruby)

Ruby Armor (Same as diamond armor)

Ruby Tools and Sword (Just a bit better than diamond armor)

 

If you have any suggestions, leave them in the comments below! I will try to add them if I think it fits with the mod.




Credits:


Minecraft Earth, for the Ruby Texture
